name: Crosshatch
description: Cells crossed by both diagonals into an X-hatch, the strokes re-colouring on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 43%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 43% 57%, transparent 57%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 43%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 43% 57%, transparent 57%); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 44%; top: 44%; @size: 12%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
